name: Pocket City 2
short_description: A city-building game with a unique twist—step inside and experience your city firsthand! Plan roads, zones, and infrastructure while growing your economy, managing resources, and unlocking special buildings. Host events, build mega projects, and watch your city thrive in a dynamic world.
detailed_description:
Pocket City 2 adds a playful twist to city-building, giving you more ways to create, explore, and have fun! Construct your ideal metropolis with intuitive tools, then step inside and experience it firsthand. You're not just managing a city—you’re part of it. Walk, drive, and fly through your streets, meet citizens, and even stir up a little mayhem!

Plan roads, zones, and landmarks while balancing strategy and creativity. Optimize your city's growth with special buildings, expand its borders, and bring it to life with events. Whether you're developing a booming economy, hosting festivals, or simply wandering your world, Pocket City 2 offers a fun and dynamic way to build and play.

Features:

🏙️ Build & Expand – Create a thriving city with zones, special buildings, and unique landmarks.

🚶 Jump In & Explore – Control your avatar, walk the streets, and interact with NPCs.

🌆 A Living World – Enjoy seasons, a day-night cycle, and dynamic events.

🎮 Minigames & Activities – Race cars, fly planes, and take on quirky challenges.

🎉 Lively Events – Host block parties, respond to disasters, or see what happens!

🏠 Customize & Collect – Decorate your home, unlock outfits, and personalize your city.

💰 Grow & Upgrade – Complete quests, invest in mega projects, and earn rewards.

🌍 Creative & Challenge Modes – Relax in Sandbox Mode or test your skills in Survival Mode.

Updated for PC:

🎮 Updated Controls & UI – Optimized for a seamless PC experience.

🏙️ Larger Maximum City Size – Build bigger and better than ever.

🎨 Updated Visuals & Audio – Enjoy improved graphics and sound design.

🏗️ New Buildings – Expand your city with fresh additions.

Build, Expand, and Shape Your City!

Plan and develop a thriving metropolis by zoning residential, commercial, and industrial areas while managing power, water, and new systems like waste and sewage. Gather natural resources for upgrades, research, and income. Unlock new buildings by completing quests and improving relationships with citizens through encounters and city events. Take on massive Mega Projects—time-intensive investments that bring major benefits to your city.

Explore and Interact in 3D

Step inside your city as your custom avatar and roam freely! Walk through neighborhoods, interact with NPCs, and discover loot scattered around town. Drive through your streets, visit interiors, and experience your city in a new way with a full day-night cycle and seasonal changes.

Minigames and Activities

Take a break from city management with fun and dynamic minigames. Race through the streets, fly planes, pilot a fire helicopter, run businesses, and more! Level up your city to unlock new challenges and rewards.

Customize Your Avatar and Home

Create your own character and buy a home in the city! Furnish and decorate it with furniture from shops and quest rewards. Host house parties to boost your relationships with citizens.

Events and Challenges

Keep your city lively with block parties, festivals, parades, and more. But be ready—disasters like fires and storms can strike, causing chaos to your economy and buildings. Quickly rebuild and keep your city thriving!

Face Off Against Rival Cities

Compete in City Competitions against NPC-controlled cities to prove who’s the better mayor. Win and unlock new special buildings to enhance your metropolis!

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Ukrainian
*languages with full audio support
